name: sound traps
identity: A defensive item used to detect approaching enemies and redirect them through noise and disorientation. Constructed from hollowed bones, dried gourds filled with small pebbles, and stretched animal hides, they form a crucial part of the settlement's layered defense strategy.
current_status: Actively deployed in the outer defenses to funnel and disorient Gorok's warriors during a simulated night raid, functioning as part of a complex redirection system.

purpose.value: detection of approaching movement and enemy redirection

function.value: detection of approaching movement and inducing subtle disorientation

construction_materials.value: hollowed bones, dried gourds filled with small pebbles, stretched animal hides

volatile_state.current_activity: funneling and disorienting Gorok's warriors during a simulated night raid
